statement: In every magma, Equation 3156 (`x = (((y * y) * y) * z) * y`) implies Equation 3621 (`x * y = z * ((z * y) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0201
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op (op y y) y) z) y)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op z (op (op z y) y))
